CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Smoothly return to center, level flight.
CONTROLS.NAME: recenter

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Forward flight speed in units per second.
CONTROLS.NAME: fly_speed

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: How far the camera sees before fading to space.
CONTROLS.NAME: draw_distance

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Minimum flight altitude above the surface.
CONTROLS.NAME: min_height

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Scale of base terrain undulation between craters.
CONTROLS.NAME: terrain_roughness

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Sun azimuth around the Moon (0–1 = full 360° rotation).
CONTROLS.NAME: sun_angle

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Sun height above horizon — low values cast long dramatic shadows across craters.
CONTROLS.NAME: sun_elevation

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Surface color tint: 0 = warm dusty tan, 1 = cool earthshine blue.
CONTROLS.NAME: moon_tint

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: How strongly bass pulses the ambient brightness and crater rim glow.
CONTROLS.NAME: bass_reactivity

DESCRIPTION: Fly over a cratered Moon surface. Procedural height-field terrain with large, medium, and small craters. No atmosphere — harsh sunlight, deep shadows, star field. Flying mechanics from Ocean Sunset.
TITLE: Moon
